options.name: -area
options.description: specifies in which area that the command will be used

options.name: -bumps
options.description: find pin port num for bumps

options.name: -cellName
options.description: find pin port num of instance of specified cell

options.name: -geometry_height
options.description: Specifies the range of the height of the geometry of the target port and if only one variable, the height is equal with the specified value

options.name: -geometry_width
options.description: Specifies the range of the width of the geometry of the target port and if only one variable, the width is equal with the specified value

options.name: -instName
options.description: find pin port num of specified instance

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the name of the layer on which the target port is

options.name: -netName
options.description: find port num on pin connectted to specified net

options.name: -pinName
options.description: find port num on specified pin

options.name: -selected
options.description: find pin port num of selected instance
